title: Images of key aphid pests following identification utilising taxonomic keys
author: Ballandras, Virgile
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: These images depict specimens that contributed to DNA isolated for sequencing purposes. The images were captured to confirm taxonomic classification, which can be correlated with mitochondrial sequence data used in the extraction of sequences for DNA metabarcoding. The associated DNA seqeunce data for each species has been depsotied in the NCBI Short Read Archive and can be accessed via the following BioProject with accession number PRJNA1283222
